name: blog
description: A blog: posts with Markdown body, tags, cover image and draft/published status. Public list (tag filter) + /blog/:slug + RSS feed, admin CRUD. Posts carry a jsonb metadata field for project-specific fields.

inject.text: { href: "/admin/blog", label: (t) => t.blog.nav, icon: NewspaperIcon, adminOnly: true },

blog: { nav: "Blog", title_: "Blog", subtitle: "Write and publish posts.", add: "New post", editTitle: "Edit post", title: "Title", slug: "Slug", excerpt: "Excerpt", body: "Body (Markdown)", author: "Author", tags: "Tags (comma-separated)", status: "Status", coverImage: "Cover image URL", edit: "Edit", delete: "Delete", cancel: "Cancel", save: "Save", saving: "Saving…", saved: "Saved", deleted: "Deleted", saveError: "Failed to save", loading: "Loading…", empty: "No posts yet.", published: "Published", total: "{count} posts" },

blog: { nav: "블로그", title_: "블로그", subtitle: "글을 작성하고 발행합니다.", add: "새 글", editTitle: "글 편집", title: "제목", slug: "슬러그", excerpt: "요약", body: "본문(마크다운)", author: "작성자", tags: "태그(쉼표 구분)", status: "상태", coverImage: "커버 이미지 URL", edit: "편집", delete: "삭제", cancel: "취소", save: "저장", saving: "저장 중…", saved: "저장됨", deleted: "삭제됨", saveError: "저장 실패", loading: "불러오는 중…", empty: "글이 없습니다.", published: "발행일", total: "{count}개 글" },

### blog
- Posts: public `GET /blog` (`?tag=` filter), `GET /blog/:slug`, `GET /blog/rss.xml`; admin CRUD under `/admin/blog`. Render `body` with the markdown module's `<Markdown/>`.
- Extend a post with project-specific fields via its `metadata` (jsonb) — no migration.

instructions: Create the post table:  npm run migration:run -w <app>-api
Public list:  curl localhost:5002/api/blog   ·   RSS:  curl localhost:5002/api/blog/rss.xml
Write posts in the admin UI (/admin/blog).
Add project-specific fields per post in its metadata (jsonb) — no schema change needed.
